steps.title: Pick simple values
steps.content:
Since $b$ is $87\%$ of $c$, choose $c=100$ and $b=87$. Then
$$b+c=87+100=187$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content:
Now divide by $b$ and convert to a percent:
$$\frac{a}{b}\cdot100\%=\frac{\frac{2088}{100}(187)}{87}\cdot100\%=4488\%$$
The answer is D.
